mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_favorite (user_id, target_type, target_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId})
INSERT IGNORE INTO t_favorite (user_id, target_type, target_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM t_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
SELECT target_id FROM t_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = #{targetType} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT f.*, CASE f.target_type WHEN 1 THEN s.scenic_name WHEN 2 THEN h.hotel_name WHEN 3 THEN n.title END AS target_name, CASE f.target_type WHEN 1 THEN s.cover_image WHEN 2 THEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(h.images, '$[0]')) WHEN 3 THEN n.cover_image END AS target_cover FROM t_favorite f LEFT JOIN t_scenic s ON f.target_type = 1 AND f.target_id = s.scenic_id LEFT JOIN t_hotel h ON f.target_type = 2 AND f.target_id = h.hotel_id LEFT JOIN t_travel_note n ON f.target_type = 3 AND f.target_id = n.note_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.target_type = #{targetType} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
